# robots.txt for clawforce.ca
# Generated by ClawTrak (clawtrak.com) on 2026-03-14
# Includes AI crawler governance directives
#
# For agent engagement rules, see: https://clawforce.ca/AGENTS.md
# For LLM context, see: https://clawforce.ca/llms.txt

# ═══ Standard Search Engines ═══
User-agent: Googlebot
Allow: /
Disallow: /admin
Disallow: /internal
Disallow: /private
Disallow: /api/*

User-agent: Bingbot
Allow: /
Disallow: /admin
Disallow: /internal
Disallow: /private
Disallow: /api/*

# Default for other standard crawlers
User-agent: *
Allow: /
Disallow: /admin
Disallow: /internal
Disallow: /private
Disallow: /api/*

# ═══ AI Training Crawlers ═══
# Control whether AI companies can use your content for model training.
# This does NOT affect generative search results or AI-powered search.
# Note: /llms.txt and /AGENTS.md are explicitly allowed for all crawlers.

User-agent: GPTBot
Allow: /llms.txt
Allow: /AGENTS.md
Allow: /.well-known/agent
Disallow: /

User-agent: CCBot
Allow: /llms.txt
Allow: /AGENTS.md
Disallow: /

User-agent: Google-Extended
Disallow: /

User-agent: Bytespider
Disallow: /

User-agent: Applebot-Extended
Disallow: /

User-agent: ClaudeBot
Allow: /llms.txt
Allow: /AGENTS.md
Allow: /.well-known/agent
Disallow: /

User-agent: Claude-Web
Allow: /llms.txt
Allow: /AGENTS.md
Disallow: /

User-agent: Anthropic
Allow: /llms.txt
Allow: /AGENTS.md
Disallow: /

User-agent: cohere-ai
Allow: /llms.txt
Allow: /AGENTS.md
Disallow: /

User-agent: FacebookBot
Disallow: /

# ═══ AI-Powered Search Engines ═══
# These crawlers power generative search (Perplexity, SearchGPT, etc.).
# Blocking them means your business won't appear in AI search results.

User-agent: ChatGPT-User
Allow: /
Disallow: /admin
Disallow: /internal
Disallow: /private
Disallow: /api/*

User-agent: PerplexityBot
Allow: /
Disallow: /admin
Disallow: /internal
Disallow: /private
Disallow: /api/*

User-agent: OAI-SearchBot
Allow: /
Disallow: /admin
Disallow: /internal
Disallow: /private
Disallow: /api/*

# ═══ Crawl Rate ═══
Crawl-delay: 1

Sitemap: https://clawforce.ca/sitemap.xml

# ═══ End of robots.txt ═══
# For full agent governance: https://clawforce.ca/AGENTS.md
